name: aos-phpunit
description: Parse PHPUnit tests in PHP files and run them from VS Code.

phpunitRunner.phpExecutable.description: PHP executable used when launching PHPUnit.

phpunitRunner.phpunitCommand.description: Explicit PHPUnit executable or script path. Leave empty to auto-detect vendor/bin/phpunit or fallback to phpunit on PATH.

phpunitRunner.configurationFile.description: Optional phpunit.xml or phpunit.xml.dist path relative to the workspace folder or absolute on disk.

phpunitRunner.workingDirectory.description: Optional working directory relative to the workspace folder or absolute on disk. Defaults to the current file's workspace folder.

phpunitRunner.docker.enable.description: Execute PHPUnit inside a Docker container using docker exec.

phpunitRunner.docker.command.description: Docker CLI command used to execute PHPUnit inside a container.

phpunitRunner.docker.container.description: Target Docker container name or ID used when docker execution is enabled.

phpunitRunner.docker.workspacePath.description: Workspace root path inside the Docker container. Leave empty to reuse the host workspace path.

phpunitRunner.docker.execArgs.description: Additional arguments appended to docker exec before the container name.

phpunitRunner.additionalArgs.description: Additional arguments appended to every PHPUnit invocation.

phpunitRunner.testFileGlobs.description: Glob patterns used when refreshing PHPUnit tests across the workspace.

commands.title: PHPUnit Runner: Run Test At Cursor
